title: Integration Scripts
summary: Updated all integration scripts to use unified database (n5_core.db via db_paths.py)

changes: Updated get_reconnects() to query 'people' table instead of 'profiles'
Field mapping: full_name, last_contact_date, markdown_path, company, title
Implemented query_crm_profile() to query 'people' table with deals, interactions, relationships
Updated auto_create_crm_profiles() to INSERT into 'people' table instead of creating markdown files
Replaced CRM_DB from N5.lib.paths with N5_CORE_DB
Updated upsert_individual() to use 'people' table instead of 'individuals'

files_identified_but_not_modified.reason: Uses stakeholder_profile.md files from meeting folders, not CRM database - no changes needed
Uses stakeholder_profile.md files from meeting folders, not CRM database - no changes needed
Uses load_stakeholder_profile() from meeting folders, not CRM database - no changes needed

imports_tested: cc_outreach_processor.py - OK (CRM functions only, full import requires vos_tag_parser)
n5_networking_event_process.py - OK (CRM functions only, full import requires blocks.llm_client)

notes_for_orchestrator: n5_networking_event_process.py has missing dependency: blocks.llm_client - this is a pre-existing issue, not introduced by this work
cc_outreach_processor.py requires vos_tag_parser.py in same directory - works when run from N5/scripts/
Follow-up email generators use meeting-local stakeholder_profile.md files, not CRM database - this is by design for meeting context
All scripts now use db_paths.py fallback pattern for robustness

checklist.follow_up_generators_updated: N/A - use meeting-local profiles, not CRM DB
